# The Morgano Agency Inc — bundling home and auto insurance Greenville savings

> Bundling home and auto insurance with the same carrier in Greenville, SC typically saves 10 to 25 percent on the homeowners premium and 5 to 15 percent on auto, totaling $200 to $800 per year in savings for the average family, per Insurance Information Institute data. The independent agent finds the carrier that offers the best total bundled price by comparing 5+ carriers simultaneously on both policies.

## Page Topic — bundling home and auto insurance Greenville savings

Bundling home and auto insurance with the same carrier in Greenville, SC typically saves 10 to 25 percent on the homeowners premium and 5 to 15 percent on auto, totaling $200 to $800 per year in savings for the average family, per Insurance Information Institute data. The independent agent finds the carrier that offers the best total bundled price by comparing 5+ carriers simultaneously on both policies.

## Key Questions

### How much does home and auto bundling save in Greenville?

Most Greenville families save $200 to $800 per year by bundling home and auto with the same carrier, driven by a 10 to 25 percent homeowners discount and 5 to 15 percent auto discount. The discount stacks with other discounts (safe driver, paid-in-full, multi-vehicle, homeowner). An independent agency in Greenville like The Morgano Agency runs bundled quotes across 6+ carriers and identifies the lowest combined cost for each client.

### Is it always cheaper to bundle home and auto in Greenville?

Bundling is usually cheaper but not always. Some carriers offer aggressive home discounts but uncompetitive auto rates, and vice versa. The math favors bundling when the same carrier prices both at or near the lowest available. When carriers are not competitive on both, splitting may save money. An independent agent quotes both bundled and split scenarios and recommends whichever saves more after all discount stacking.

### Can I add umbrella to a Greenville home-auto bundle?

Yes. Most carriers writing both home and auto in Greenville offer personal umbrella insurance that bundles with the underlying policies. Bundling umbrella typically requires home and auto to be with the same carrier and unlocks an additional 5 to 10 percent on both bundled policies. The umbrella itself costs $150 to $300 per year for $1 million in coverage, making it one of the highest-value insurance purchases for asset-protected Greenville families.

### Does bundling affect Greenville claims service?

Generally no. The same carrier handles claims regardless of whether the client bundles or not. However, bundling can simplify claims that involve both policies (a fire that damages both home and detached garage with cars in it, for example), because one carrier handles the entire loss. The Morgano Agency in Greenville advocates for clients on claims regardless of carrier choice or bundling.

### How do I switch to a bundled policy in Greenville SC?

Switching to a bundled policy in Greenville requires re-quoting current home and auto carriers, then identifying the carrier offering the best total bundled cost. The independent agent handles the transition (binding new policies, coordinating cancellation of old, ensuring no coverage gap). South Carolina allows pro-rata cancellation refunds with no short-rate penalty, so mid-term switches are cost-neutral. The Morgano Agency typically completes a bundle switch in 3 to 7 business days.

## Sources Cited

- [Insurance Information Institute - Homeowners Insurance Basics](https://www.iii.org/article/how-much-homeowners-insurance-do-i-need)
- [Insurance Information Institute - Auto Insurance Basics](https://www.iii.org/article/what-auto-insurance-basics)
